title: Inst. Kadriye AYRIK
content:
Inst. Kadriye AYRIK

kayrik@29mayis.edu.tr

Resume

Full Time

Resume

Lect. Kadriye AYRIK graduated from Tishreen University, Department of Arabic Language and Literature in 2010. She earned her Master’s degree in Media and Communication Systems from Istanbul Commerce University in 2017.

Between 2003 and 2013, she acquired extensive pedagogical experience teaching Arabic at various educational institutions in both Syria and Türkiye. In 2018, she contributed as a member of the Curriculum and Supervision Methodology Commission for Teaching Arabic to Non-Native Speakers at the Başakşehir Islamic Academy.

Her professional background includes serving in public institutions in Türkiye between 2017 and 2019. Additionally, in 2020, she contributed to social responsibility and accessibility projects by performing audiobook narration for the Federation of the Visually Impaired.

Since 2019, she has been serving as a Lecturer in the Arabic Preparatory Program at the Istanbul 29 Mayıs University, School of Foreign Languages.
